subject: Re: Is dose weighting performed on tiltseries in WarpTools?
body:
Hi Maurice,

Good question! Your statement is a bit simplistic - doing TM well relies on
knowing exactly what was done to the data prior to and during
reconstruction. Warp knows exactly what it did and accounts for all of that
internally, there are some good notes in the Warp paper.
What other TM implementations require as input to perform optimally is
basically the wild west...

Recommended reading if interested: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15065679/

Cheers,

Alister

On Sun, 12 Oct 2025 at 16:07, Maurice Frijns <m.a.frijns2000@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Hi Allister,
>
> Thanks for the quick reply, very helpful!
>
> I’m still fairly new to tomography processing, so I just wanted to clarify
> something. I was under the impression that template matching generally
> gives better results when performed on dose-weighted tomograms.
>
> If dose weighting of the tilt series is only applied in M, does that mean
> I’d be running template matching on non–dose-weighted tomograms when using
> WarpTools-preprocessed data?
>
> Thanks again for your help!
>
> Cheers,
>
> Maurice
>
> Op zondag 12 oktober 2025 om 22:58:52 UTC+2 schreef alist...@gmail.com:
>
>> Hi Maurice,
>>
>> Dose weighting is applied during movie export based on the per-frame dose
>> supplied in your input settings file
>>
>> https://github.com/warpem/warp/blob/656a2d4ff1ed9ab9ecbd6b5cf9d27db8c134284a/WarpLib/Movie/Movie.ExportMovie.cs#L202-L206
>>
>> Dose weighting is also applied when reconstructing particle series for
>> export to RELION
>>
>> https://github.com/warpem/warp/blob/656a2d4ff1ed9ab9ecbd6b5cf9d27db8c134284a/WarpLib/TiltSeries/TiltSeries.ReconstructParticleSeries.cs#L114-L140
>>
>> I remember Dimitry saying that the effects of dose weighting being
>> applied twice, first to the movie and then cumulatively at the tilt series
>> level, were accounted for - I assume this is true but couldn't find it
>> quickly poking around the code, it's probably done in M somewhere :-)
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> On Sun, 12 Oct 2025 at 10:35, Maurice Frijns <m.a.fri...@gmail.com>
>> wrote:
>>
>>> Hi all,
>>>
>>> I couldn't find anywhere in the documentation of WarpTools if dose
>>> weighting is performed during motion correction for tilt series, I assume
>>> not as the required input is not provided. Is that a correct assumption?
>>> and if so, is dose weighting performed during a later step?
>>>
>>> Cheers,
>>>
>>> Maurice
>>>
